title: alternanthera celosioides
intro: Alternanthera celosioides, also known as Cheesefruit or Kalanag, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia and Australia, characterized by its reddish stems and leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Alternanthera celosioides include the treatment of various diseases such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are also used in traditional remedies, such as in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
